sentences.arabic: أَحْدَثَتِ الثَّوْرَةُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ تَغَيُّرًا جَذْرِيًّا فِي مَفْهُومِ الْخُصُوصِيَّةِ الْفَرْدِيَّةِ فِي الْعَصْرِ الْحَدِيثِ.
sentences.translation: Digitalna revolucija donijela je korjenitu promjenu u poimanju individualne privatnosti u modernom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: The digital revolution has brought a radical change to the concept of individual privacy in the modern era.

sentences.arabic: لَوْ لَمْ يَنْتَبِهِ الْمُسْتَخْدِمُونَ إِلَى إِعْدَادَاتِ الْأَمَانِ، لَأَصْبَحَتْ بَيَانَاتُهُمْ عُرْضَةً لِلِاسْتِغْلَالِ مِنْ قِبَلِ الشَّرِكَاتِ الْكُبْرَى.
sentences.translation: Da korisnici nisu obraćali pažnju na postavke sigurnosti, njihovi bi podaci postali podložni eksploataciji od strane velikih kompanija.
sentences.translationEn: If users had not paid attention to security settings, their data would have become vulnerable to exploitation by major corporations.

sentences.arabic: تَقُومُ الْخَوَارِزْمِيَّاتُ الْمُعَقَّدَةُ بِتَحْلِيلِ أَنْمَاطِ السُّلُوكِ الْبَشَرِيِّ لِبِنَاءِ مَلَفَّاتٍ تَعْرِيفِيَّةٍ دَقِيقَةٍ لِلْأَفْرَادِ.
sentences.translation: Složeni algoritmi analiziraju obrasce ljudskog ponašanja kako bi izgradili precizne profile pojedinaca.
sentences.translationEn: Complex algorithms analyze human behavior patterns to build precise profiles of individuals.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ أَنْ تَسُنَّ الدُّوَلُ تَشْرِيعَاتٍ صَارِمَةً لِحِمَايَةِ السِّيَادَةِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ لِمُوَاطِنِيهَا.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je da države donesu stroge zakone radi zaštite digitalnog suvereniteta svojih građana.
sentences.translationEn: It is essential for states to enact strict legislation to protect the digital sovereignty of their citizens.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي نِهَايَةِ الْمَطَافِ، يَبْقَى الْوَعْيُ الشَّخْصِيُّ هُوَ خَطَّ الدِّفَاعِ الْأَوَّلَ ضِدَّ التَّهْدِيدَاتِ السِّيبِرَانِيَّةِ الْمُتَزَايِدَةِ.
sentences.translation: U konačnici, lična svijest ostaje prva linija odbrane od rastućih sajber prijetnji.
sentences.translationEn: Ultimately, personal awareness remains the first line of defense against increasing cyber threats.
